name: button-54
title: Button 54
description: Button with stitched border design using layered shadow effects

files.content: 'use client' import * as React from 'react' import type { VariantProps } from 'class-variance-authority' import { Button, buttonVariants } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/button' import { BorderBeam } from '@/registry/new-york/ui/border-beam' import { cn } from '@/registry/new-york/lib/utils' interface NeuralButtonProps extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes { size?: VariantProps['size'] children?: React.ReactNode asChild?: boolean } function NeuralButton(props: NeuralButtonProps) { const { children, asChild = false, size, className, ...rest } = props const neuralStyles = cn( 'relative z-1 overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-sky-600! text-white ring-2 ring-sky-600/60! transition-transform duration-200 ease-in-out hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 dark:bg-sky-400/60! dark:ring-sky-400/60!', // size-based adjustments size === 'lg' && 'text-base has-[>svg]:px-6', className ) const backgroundDecorations = ( <> ) const overlayDecorations = ( <> ) if (asChild && React.isValidElement(children)) { const childProps = children.props as any return React.cloneElement(children, { className: cn(buttonVariants({ variant: 'default', size: size }), neuralStyles, childProps.className), ...rest, children: ( <> {backgroundDecorations} {childProps.children} {overlayDecorations} ) } as any) } return ( ) } export { NeuralButton, type NeuralButtonProps }
